title: Parallel test suite and validation for enhanced Renode models (BLE, USBD, GNSS, LoRa)
description: Develop and run integration tests for all new peripherals in Renode. Use python/tests/sim/ and Renode test scripts. Validate fidelity against real hardware traces where possible. Update renode-workflow.md with new capabilities. Close when all tests pass and fidelity confirmed.
